problem: Why is turbulent fluid flow mathematically unpredictable — Navier-Stokes unsolved
mechanism: Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure
hypothesis: Combining Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.
